videos.title: "Is social media fooling us? 🤔 Decode Gen Z life with Kho Gaye Hum Kahan 🎶 #TheMusicStory #Shorts
videos.description:
Is social media fooling us? 🤔 We're diving deep into the Kho Gaye Hum Kahan soundtrack to decode the complexities of the Gen Z world. Work hard, party harder, and find out what it all means!

The Music Story's new episode is OUT NOW! 🎶

videos.title: Is Social Media Fooling Us? | Kho Gaye Hum Kahan Music Decoded | The Music Story | Abhishek Mishra
videos.description:
👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Zee Music Company - https://bit.ly/2yPcBkS

After exploring timeless soundtracks in our earlier episodes, we now decode the soul of Gen Z through the music of Kho Gaye Hum Kahan. This episode unravels how each song mirrors a phase of self-discovery — from the wild rush of Hone Do Jo Hota Hai to the tender wounds of Teri Yeh Baatein, and finally the liberating embrace of the title track Kho Gaye Hum Kahan.

In a world where social media blurs reality, these songs remind us of what

videos.title: Love at first sight—real or just cute?| Avneet Kaur & Shantanu | Love in Vietnam | On Set Off Script
videos.description:
👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Zee Music Company - https://bit.ly/ZeeMusicCo 

In this episode, Avneet Kaur and Shantanu Maheshwari open about their guilty pleasure movies, set the record straight on rumours, and share personal stories you won’t find online. From debating love at first sight versus slow-burn relationships to laughing over travel misadventures, the duo keeps it real and entertaining. They also reflect on their journey while filming Love in Vietnam - India’s first landmark co-production with Vie

videos.title: I Was Destined To Work On The Bengal Files | Vivek Agnihotri | Rohit Sharma | On Set Off Script
videos.description:
👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Zee Music Company - https://bit.ly/ZeeMusicCo 

This episode features Rohit Sharma, the music director of The Bengal Files in a conversation with Vivek Ranjan Agnihotri. It explores the profound connection between spirituality and music through various anecdotes and experiences. Highlights include personal reflections on generational trauma, the role of music in film, and the use of classical and experimental music. The discussion also touches on the logistics of music production

videos.description:
🎙 On Set Off Script | Aamir Khan x India’s Top RJs 🎬
For the first time ever, India’s most loved RJs — RJ Yunus, RJ Malishka, RJ Salil, RJ Stutee, & RJ Jeeturaaj— come together for a lively, no-holds-barred conversation with Aamir Khan!

✨ It’s fun, it’s fresh, and it’s happening for the first time!
📽️ Dive into this one-of-a-kind conversation — only on On Set Off Script.

#AamirKhan #SitaareZameenPar #OnSetOffScript #ZeeMusic #RJCollective #RadioMeetsCinema #BollywoodUnplugged #FirstTimeEver

भक्ति, ज्ञान और विरासत का संगम 
A film that is a sacred journey into India's spiritual soul. It depicts the life of Sant Tukaram, who, against all odds, rose from a humble beginning to become a living God, an immortal saint, philosopher, and reformer. His devotees call him ' Jagat Guru'. Written and directed by Aditya Om and produced by B. Gautham in association with Purushottam Studios.

In cinemas 18th July 2025

videos.description:

The Music Story showcases songs with interesting backstories and trivia that takes viewers on an engaging journey through the hidden histories of iconic tracks.

🎵 The Music Story | Episode 1: Kalank 🎬
0:00 - Introduction
2:16 - Context of Kalank 
3:00 - The ‘Iconic’ Intro Tune
3:23 - Kalank is Conflict of Ishq & Zamana
4:45 - Roop & Zafar’s Lovestory

videos.title: #BabbuMaan #NimratKaurA Join #AnkitaBhalla for an unfiltered conversation #Shorts #OnSetOffScript
videos.description:
🎙️ Out Tomorrow on On Set Off Script!
Two powerful voices. One unforgettable story.

Babbu Maan and Nimrat Kaur Ahluwalia join Ankita Bhalla for an unfiltered conversation about their upcoming film, Shaunki Sardar. 🎬✨

From on-set madness to deep cultural roots, they talk passion, purpose, and what makes this film more than just another release.

Expect honesty, laughter, and moments straight from the heart.

🎧 Episode drops tomorrow — only on On Set Off Script!

#ShaunkiSardar #BabbuMaan #Nimra
